subject: Fixing sonar issues

trigger DNS.

I'm just going through the sonar issues list in order of appearance and doing one commit per one sonar issue. Jira issue is used as tracker for all commits related to one file.

Patch Set 2:

> > (1 comment)
> I'm just going through the sonar issues list in order of appearance and doing one commit per one sonar issue. Jira issue is used as tracker for all commits related to one file.

SDC-2660 refers to different file (ConfigurationUtils.java) and different issue, can you update commit message with correct one.

IMPO, it should be one commit per one file, and not per one sonar issue.

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 2:
>

> > > 
> > > (1 comment)
> > I'm just going through the sonar issues list in order of appearance and doing one commit per one sonar issue. Jira issue is used as tracker for all commits related to one file.
> 
> SDC-2660 refers to different file (ConfigurationUtils.java) and different issue, can you update commit message with correct one.

I've updated Jira issue, it pointed to the wrong file.
 
> IMPO, it should be one commit per one file, and not per one sonar issue.

Well, small commits considered as a best practice. In case of committing all file changes at once patch can easily become hard to read and understand as parts of patch might be logically disconnected (as in this particular case). In case of logically connected issues of course it's better to keep related changes together, I cannot disagree. I'll pay more attention to keep commits more consistent.
